title: Invisible Armor Items
description: Armor that is made of glass has no base stats. You can use this to show off trims without that pesky armor behind it. But you can also enchant the armor still if you decided that you just wanted to show off your skin without too much of a loss.
body: A simple mod that adds invisible armor that can be made out of glass panes. You can trim the glass armor and the trim appears to just float on your skin. Glass armor has no base stats other than durability so it gives no protection. You can enchant glass armor ONLY in an anvil.
